title: Mnzake's GUI
description: A cool blue themed GUI texture pack that looks great while pvping and adds several quality of life tweaks.
body: A custom made blue GUI texture pack that encludes features like a new crosshair, blue expirance bar, blue hearts and absorption hearts, visible wither hearts, tweaked drowning bubbles, better effect outlines, blue armor bar, blue hunger bar, highlighted button outlines, no carved punkin overlay and a slighty better inventory. visit gallary to see textures.
